\t表示在一个时间间隔内，Graphics或Compute引擎处于Active的:
The fraction of time during an interval that the Graphics or Compute engines were Active.
This value is the average across all Graphics and Compute engines.

A Graphics or Compute engine is Active when a Graphics or Compute Context is bound to a thread and that Context is Busy.
FP16 pipeline处于活动状态的周期比率: Ratio of Cycles the FP16 Pipeline Is Active
FP32 pipeline处于活动状态的周期比率: Ratio of Cycles the FP32 Pipeline Is Active
FP64 pipeline处于活动状态的周期比率: Ratio of Cycles the FP64 Pipeline Is Active
GPU 训练/数据处理任务 平均利用率: GPU Training / Data Processing Job Average Usage
IB网卡端口每秒网络带宽使用: IB NIC Port Network Bandwidth per Second
JOB 所在主机的负载监控: Load Monitoring of the Host Running the Job
RSS，常驻内存集（Resident Set Size），是进程实际使用物理内存:
RSS, the Resident Set Size, is the amount of physical memory a process actually uses. For example, the space used by the heap and the stack inside a process is part of RSS. RSS usage is controlled by the process itself without kernel intervention. For example, manual memory reclamation in C++ and the GC mechanisms of Python/Golang both affect RSS usage.

cache is the cache part of physical memory. When there is spare memory, the kernel usually keeps some temporary file data read by processes in physical memory, so that reading the same data later can be served from memory instead of disk, which improves read speed. When available memory runs low, the kernel actively reclaims the cache memory that is no longer used according to the LRU algorithm, and the reclaimed memory can be used by processes again.

Memory limit: the maximum physical memory a process can use.

Task OOM is related to RSS usage. When RSS reaches the memory limit and the process keeps requesting memory, it may report "cannot allocate memory" or trigger the oom killer.
Read bytes 每个磁盘分区每秒读取的比特数\nWritten bytes:
Read bytes: bytes read per second on each disk partition
Written bytes: bytes written per second on each disk partition
SM 至少分配了 1 个warp的周期比率: Ratio of Cycles With at Least 1 Warp Assigned to an SM
SM上驻留的warp数量的比率: Ratio of Warps Resident on an SM
tensor (HMMA) pipline 处于活动状态的周期比率: Ratio of Cycles the Tensor (HMMA) Pipeline Is Active
不同型号的卡TFLOPs值不同,按需修改。: TFLOPs values differ between card models, adjust as needed.
使用GPU的容器cpu使用率: CPU Usage of Containers Using GPU
包含process context switch和thread context: Includes process context switch and thread context switch
包含集群所有非维护状态的gpu服务器: Includes all GPU servers in the cluster that are not in maintenance state
图形引擎处于活动状态的时间百分比: Percentage of Time the Graphics Engine Is Active
打开的文件描述符(左 )/每秒上下文切换次数(右): Open File Descriptors (Left) / Context Switches per Second (Right)
显卡内存时钟，可以理解为，是显卡内存存储数据的频率，高低影响显卡内存数据的吞吐量:
The GPU memory clock can be understood as the frequency at which GPU memory stores data; it affects the data throughput of GPU memory.
The basic unit of frequency is hertz, counted in steps of one thousand; 1 MHz equals 1000 kilohertz (KHz), that is 10^6 hertz.
每1秒内I/O操作耗时占比: Ratio of Time Spent on I/O Operations per Second
每一秒钟的自然时间内，花费在I/O上的耗时。（wall-clock time）\:
The time spent on I/O within each second of natural time (wall-clock time).

node_disk_io_time_seconds_total:
Seconds the disk spent on input/output operations. This value is cumulative. (Milliseconds Spent Doing I/Os)

rate(node_disk_io_time_seconds_total[1m]):
Calculates the per-second rate: (last value - previous value) / timestamp difference, that is, the fraction of one second the disk spent on I/O operations.
表示FP16（半精度）管道处于Active的周期分数。\n该值表示一个时间间隔内:
The fraction of cycles the FP16 (half precision) pipe is Active.
This value is an average over a time interval, not an instantaneous value.

A higher value means the FP16 Cores have higher utilization.

A value of 1 (100%) means one FP16 instruction is executed every two cycles (Volta class cards for example) over the whole interval.

If the value is 0.2 (20%), the possible situations include:
During the whole interval, the FP16 Cores of 20% of the SMs run at 100% utilization.
During the whole interval, the FP16 Cores of 100% of the SMs run at 20% utilization.
During 1/5 of the whole interval, the FP16 Cores on 100% of the SMs run at 100% utilization.
表示FP64（双精度）Pipe处于Active状态的周期分数。\n该值表示一个时:
The fraction of cycles the FP64 (double precision) pipe is Active.
This value is an average over a time interval, not an instantaneous value.

A higher value means the FP64 Cores have higher utilization.

A value of 1 (100%) means one FP64 instruction is executed every four cycles (Volta class cards for example) over the whole interval.

If the value is 0.2 (20%), the possible situations include:
During the whole interval, the FP64 Cores of 20% of the SMs run at 100% utilization.
During the whole interval, the FP64 Cores of 100% of the SMs run at 20% utilization.
During 1/5 of the whole interval, the FP64 Cores on 100% of the SMs run at 100% utilization.
表示Tensor（HMMA/IMMA） Pipe处于Active状态的周期分数。:
The fraction of cycles the Tensor (HMMA/IMMA) pipe is Active.
This value is an average over a time interval, not an instantaneous value.

A higher value means the Tensor Cores have higher utilization.

A value of 1 (100%) means a Tensor instruction is issued every other instruction cycle over the whole interval (two cycles to complete one instruction).

If the value is 0.2 (20%), the possible situations include:
During the whole interval, the Tensor Cores of 20% of the SMs run at 100% utilization.
During the whole interval, the Tensor Cores of 100% of the SMs run at 20% utilization.
During 1/5 of the whole interval, the Tensor Cores on 100% of the SMs run at 100% utilization.
表示乘加操作FMA（Fused Multiply-Add）管道处于Active的:
The fraction of cycles the FMA (Fused Multiply-Add) pipe is Active, where multiply-add operations cover FP32 (single precision) and integer operations.
This value is an average over a time interval, not an instantaneous value.

A higher value means the FP32 Cores have higher utilization.

A value of 1 (100%) means one FP32 instruction is executed every two cycles (Volta class cards for example) over the whole interval.

If the value is 0.2 (20%), the possible situations include:
During the whole interval, the FP32 Cores of 20% of the SMs run at 100% utilization.
During the whole interval, the FP32 Cores of 100% of the SMs run at 20% utilization.
During 1/5 of the whole interval, the FP32 Cores on 100% of the SMs run at 100% utilization.
表示内存带宽利用率（Memory BW Utilization）将数据发送到设备:
Memory BW Utilization, the fraction of cycles spent sending data to or receiving data from device memory.
This value is an average over a time interval, not an instantaneous value.

A higher value means device memory has higher utilization.

A value of 1 (100%) means one DRAM instruction is executed every cycle over the whole interval (in practice a peak of about 0.8 (80%) is the maximum achievable value).

A value of 0.2 (20%) means 20% of the cycles in the interval were reading from or writing to device memory.
表示在一个时间间隔内，至少一个线程束在一个SM（Streaming Multip:
The fraction of time during an interval that at least one warp was Active on an SM (Streaming Multiprocessor).
This value is the average across all SMs and is not sensitive to the number of threads per block.

A warp is Active once it has been scheduled and allocated resources; it may be Computing or not Computing (for example waiting on a memory request).

A value below 0.5 means the GPU is not used efficiently; a value above 0.8 is required.

Assume a GPU has N SMs:
A kernel running on all SMs with N thread blocks for the whole interval gives a value of 1 (100%).
A kernel running N/5 thread blocks during an interval gives a value of 0.2.
A kernel using N thread blocks but running for only 1/5 of the cycles in an interval gives a value of 0.2.
表示在一个时间间隔内，驻留在SM上的线程束与该SM最大可驻留线程束的比例。\n该:
The ratio of warps resident on an SM to the maximum number of warps that SM can host, over a time interval.
This value is the average across all SMs within the interval.

Higher occupancy does not necessarily mean higher GPU usage. Only for workloads limited by GPU memory bandwidth (DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE) does higher occupancy indicate more effective GPU usage.
表示通过PCIe总线传输/接收的通信带宽，包括协议标头和数据有效负载。: The communication bandwidth transmitted/received over the PCIe bus, including protocol headers and data payload.
设备内存接口处于活动状态发送或接收数据的周期比率: Ratio of Cycles the Device Memory Interface Is Active Sending or Receiving Data
